name: Clean (2019 Games)

movements.notes: starting weight; athletes lift in reverse order of current placement, weight increasing each round; possible weights up to 385 lb (men) / 260 lb (women)

description: A one-rep-max clean test where athletes lift in reverse order of current placement, the bar getting heavier each round.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2019/8 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; tiebreak was 5 reps at 295 lb (men) / 195 lb (women) for athletes who failed their attempt
